hotel_name: Kempinski Al Othman Hotel Al Khobar
raw_description:
Ideally located between Al Khobar and Dammam, the hotel provides easy access to the business district and is just minutes from popular shopping malls. Guests can enjoy free WiFi throughout the property.

All rooms and Suites are very spacious and offer light and contemporary décor and includes a 47 inch flat screen LED TV with a wide selection of international channels. Rooms offer a work desk, complimentary mini bar and WiFi. The spacious bathrooms includes a bathtub and/or separate walk-in shower cabin with complimentary toiletries.

There is a wide range of food and beverage outlets, from an authentic Italian experience in Il Vero to an international buffet at the all-day dining restaurant of AlDiwan. Conclude your business deal with a quick snack in the luxurious unique lobby lounge, Sky Lounge. Enab Beirut serves authentic Lebanese food.

Salvaje Al Khobar an eccentric experience in Japanese cuisine, with a unique blend of tradition, contemporary design, and premium quality.

The fitness centre offers the latest generation of cardiovascular equipment, as well as machines and dumbbells.

Mall of Dhahran is 8.2 km from Kempinski Al Othman Hotel AlKhobar, while Al Khobar Corniche is 6 km away. The nearest airport is King Fahd Airport, 41 km from Kempinski Al Othman Hotel AlKhobar.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.8for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Kempinski Al Othman Hotel Al Khobar. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Indoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
